task_description: Write a method in Dafny to find the shared elements from the given two array.
specification_response:
Method Signature:
    method SharedElements(a: array<int>, b: array<int>) returns (result: array<int>)
Postconditions_prompt:
    - The result array contains all elements that are present in both input arrays
- The result array includes only elements that appear in both arrays at least once
- The result array does not contain duplicate elements
- The order of elements in the result array does not matter
code_response:
Step 1: Determine the method’s signature.  
In this case:  
    method SharedElements(a: array<int>, b: array<int>) returns (result: seq<int>)  

Step 2: Determine the preconditions.  
In this case:  
Natural language description:  
    - Both arrays should be non-null  

Dafny specification:  
    requires a != null && b != null  

Step 3: Determine the postconditions.  
In this case:  
Natural language description:  
    - The result sequence should contain all elements that are present in both input arrays  
    - The result should not contain duplicates  
    - The order of elements in the result does not matter

Dafny specification:  
    ensures forall x :: x in result ==> (InArray(a, x) && InArray(b, x))  
    ensures forall i, j :: 0 <= i < j < |result| ==> result[i] != result[j]  

Step 4: Write the code, its formal specification, and the verification annotations that help the solver prove the postconditions.  
In this case:

```dafny
predicate InArray(a: array<int>, x: int)
  reads a
{
  exists i :: 0 <= i < a.Length && a[i] == x
}

method SharedElements(a: array<int>, b: array<int>) returns (result: seq<int>)
  requires a != null && b != null
  ensures forall x :: x in result ==> (InArray(a, x) && InArray(b, x))
  ensures forall i, j :: 0 <= i < j < |result| ==> result[i] != result[j]
{
    var res: seq<int> := [];
    for i := 0 to a.Length
        invariant 0 <= i <= a.Length
        invariant forall x :: x in res ==> InArray(a, x)
        invariant forall x :: x in res ==> InArray(b, x)
        invariant forall i, j :: 0 <= i < j < |res| ==> res[i] != res[j]
    {
        if InArray(b, a[i]) && a[i] !in res
        {
            res := res + [a[i]];
        }
    }
    result := res;
}
```
